request_payload.exposure_text: Did you know our allies are quietly shifting defense budgets away from collective security? While we're keeping our commitments, others are prioritizing domestic spending. This isn't about trust—it's about fairness. Shouldn't we expect the same level of commitment from our partners? #StrongerTogether #FairShare
